If you do it, it'll make you a lot more money. I fucking guarantee it. But I know almost none of you guys are going to do it. Right. But there's a high probability in this room— like if I was talking to normies and shit. Regular motherfuckers, then it'd be like a... 90% failure rate. But I suspect at least half of you guys will attempt it. All right. It's one secret, but I gotta, I gotta, I gotta. You want to think of it like a CPU. You know, when you have too many tabs open, what happens? Yeah, man, you guys all had too many porn hubs up and it shut down. We've all been there, looking for that right place to finish. Yeah, you guys know. This guy knows what I'm talking about. All right. So there's four areas of light. There's money, health. Sexual relationships, and friends and family. That's my best friend, white boy, Brian. And I was showing you how to put your white friend in a headlock. I was showing some people how to do that. Or they forget how bad the first six months was. Those of y'all, the parents know what's up, man. You forget, you know? And then you, you know, and that's fine. That's why the human race continues, right? But we can't forget. I feel like Ty might have forgotten how much he was working. Because I was in that same, I was in that Lamborghini that was in the garage with Ty back in those days. He wasn't really doing shit else. But working, he wasn't really doing else, yeah. Any questions for me? How do you decide to switch your own thing? My thing is perfecting my offer. When do I decide? Once it's perfected. You know, I mean, that's going to be subjective, but once you have that thing perfected. And you might get that shit done in a week, right? Because you're going to get fucking three weeks of your normal work on it in fucking one week, three, four weeks. Shit, man. And then it's probably going to be selling it. You feel me? Because I think I was working on my offer, to your point, before I was selling it. Then it was me selling it. Then, when I started building the sales team, I was looking at the numbers and I was like, 'If I did nothing else but got my close rate to 50%, I'd make—[ it was like at 25%], I was like, I doubled my income.' But it more than doubled because the ads became cheaper. Right? So we can get more people through. I was getting higher lead flow. It made, again, it made everything else unnecessary or easier, you know? So it's OK to switch it. So it's like an exercise in prioritization. Anything else? Looks like we covered it. All right.
